description_long: This armchair features a broad, boxy silhouette with thick, straight armrests and a deep, wide seat, all upholstered in a rich, dark blue fabric. The seat and backrest are generously padded, providing a plush and comfortable sitting experience. The backrest is tall and slightly reclined, offering ample support for the upper body. The armrests are wide and flat, matching the overall geometric and modern design of the chair. The chair stands on four short, blocky wooden legs that are visible beneath the upholstery, giving it a sturdy and stable base. The upholstery appears to be a solid color with a subtle, fine texture, contributing to a contemporary and inviting appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, boxy armchair upholstered in dark blue fabric with thick, straight armrests and short wooden legs. The seat and backrest are plush and padded, offering comfort and support.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, padded seat, tall backrest, and thick, straight armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the seat, the thickness of the armrest, and the slight recline of the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tall, flat backrest and the two visible blocky wooden legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, emphasizing the armrest's width and the chair's overall boxy profile.
attribute_backrest_style: tall, straight, padded, and slightly reclined
